params.name: Energy Block
params.description: Energy Blocks represent a potent energy source, synthesized through specialized refinement processes from a rare mineral. This mineral is exclusively found on a distant planetary body where, according to reports, all indigenous lifeforms exhibit mechanical characteristics...
